description: Schema for a phenotype record stored in Athena.

dataset_id.description: Identifier of the dataset this sample belongs to.

sex.description: Biological sex of the sampled individual.

birth_weight_kg.description: Birth weight of the sampled individual in kilograms.

weaing_weight_kg.description: Weaning weight of the sampled individual in kilograms.

six_month_weight_kg.description: Six-month weight of the sampled individual in kilograms.

fat_thickness_cm.description: Fat thickness of the sampled individual in centimeters.

eye_muscle_area_cm2.description: Eye muscle area of the sampled individual in square centimeters.

height_at_withers_cm.description: Height at withers of the sampled individual in centimeters.

chest_girth_cm.description: Chest girth of the sampled individual in centimeters.

shin_circumference_cm.description: Shin circumference of the sampled individual in centimeters.

pre_weaning_gain_kg.description: Pre-weaning weight gain of the sampled individual in kilograms.

post_weaning_gain_kg.description: Post-weaning weight gain of the sampled individual in kilograms.

daily_weight_gain_kg.description: Daily weight gain of the sampled individual in kilograms.

title: Phenotype
